keyDirectories.app: Expo Router file-based routing - screens and tab navigation
keyDirectories.app/(tabs): Main tab screens: dashboard, projects, photos, materials, time tracking, approvals, profile
keyDirectories.app/einstellungen: Settings screens: company, team, customers, suppliers, catalog, letterhead, import
keyDirectories.app/project: Project detail and team assignment screens
keyDirectories.server: Express backend API server with PostgreSQL
keyDirectories.components: Shared React Native components (TopBar, ErrorBoundary, OfflineBanner, BGAssistant, SyncQueue)
keyDirectories.contexts: React Context providers: Auth, Role, OfflineMode, DebugLog
keyDirectories.hooks/mutations: TanStack Query mutation hooks (create project, approval decisions)
keyDirectories.hooks/queries: TanStack Query query hooks (projects, dashboard, approvals)
keyDirectories.hooks/realtime: Supabase realtime subscription hooks for cache invalidation
keyDirectories.lib: Core utilities: Supabase client, query client, API functions, photo capture
keyDirectories.lib/api: API layer functions for approvals, dashboard, inspections, projects

projectContext.namingConventions: camelCase for files/hooks, PascalCase for components/contexts, kebab-case for route segments, German-language domain naming (begehung, angebot, rechnung, freigabe, zeiten)

implementationGuidelines: Architecture: Expo Router entry (_layout.tsx) → AuthContext/RoleContext providers → Tab navigation with file-based routing → Screens use TanStack Query hooks → hooks call lib/api functions → lib/api calls Supabase client directly OR server API endpoints → Express server (server/index.ts) → routes.ts handles /api/* with raw pg Pool queries → PostgreSQL database. Supabase realtime subscriptions invalidate query cache for live updates. Offline context manages connectivity state with sync queue.
Expo Router for file-based navigation and deep linking
TanStack React Query for server state management
Supabase JS client for auth and direct DB access
Drizzle ORM with drizzle-zod for shared schema validation
Express server with raw pg Pool for complex API routes
React Context for auth, roles, offline state, debug logging
Supabase Realtime subscriptions for live cache invalidation
expo-image-picker and expo-file-system for photo capture
patch-package for dependency patches via postinstall
n8n workflows for external automation integrations
Zod for runtime input validation across client and server

technologyPractices.projectType: Expo React Native App with Express Backend
practices: File-based routing with Expo Router (app/ directory)
Hybrid data access: Supabase direct + Express API for complex transactions
Query/Mutation hook pattern separating data fetching from UI
Context-based dependency injection for auth, roles, offline state
Offline-first with sync queue for construction site usage
Shared schema between client and server via shared/schema.ts
CORS configured for Replit dev environment and localhost
